name: Integration - Error Handling for Snyk Test Failure
description: Simulates a Snyk test failure and ensures the orchestrator returns the correct error response.
input: Patch SnykIntegration.run_snyk_test to raise Exception, then call AgentOrchestrator.process_repository with valid inputs.
output: Dictionary with success=False, error_code='ERR_SNYK_TEST_FAILED', and appropriate error message.
